title: Performance Marketing Manager – Amazon PPC (m/w/d)
matched_skills: AI tools (ChatGPT / Claude — listed in tools)
missing_skills: Amazon PPC / Amazon Ads Manager hands-on experience
Sponsored Products / Sponsored Brands / Sponsored Display campaign management
Amazon Seller or Vendor account management
German B2 + (role requires confident German client communication)
Content and listing optimisation on Amazon
core_responsibilities: Plan, control and optimise Amazon Ads campaigns (Sponsored Products, Brands, Display) autonomously for a fixed client portfolio
Develop individual PPC strategies targeting ACoS, TACoS and ROAS improvement
Conduct keyword research, campaign structuring and data-driven bid management
Systematically analyse campaign data and derive concrete optimisation actions
Create performance reports and present results directly to clients
recommended_emphasis: Highlight any data-driven campaign analytics work as the closest transferable skill to PPC optimisation
Emphasise AI-tools proficiency (ChatGPT / Claude) as it directly maps to a stated requirement
Showcase KPI reporting and performance storytelling to address the reporting and client communication responsibility
Note any exposure to e-commerce platforms, marketplace data or digital advertising context even if indirect
Be transparent about the Amazon PPC gap; frame as a structured learner with strong analytical foundation
